# Skills 压缩包下载中心

只保留 4 个主包：

1. 总包：`all-skills-bundle-v1.zip`
2. 测试包：`testing-specialties-skills-bundle-v1.zip`
3. 非测试包：`non-testing-specialties-skills-bundle-v1.zip`
4. 建议安装包：`essential-setup-skills-bundle-v1.zip`

## 直接下载

- 总包：<https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QA19816-glitch/QA-agent/main/dist/all-skills-bundle-v1.zip>
